mapper.select:
select p.id, p.product_name, p.product_pics, p.shelve_area, p.product_skus, p.product_specs, p.min_price as currentPrice, pst.view_amount, pst.order_amount, p.product_text from cm_product p left join cm_product_statistics_trend pst on pst.product_id = p.id where deleted = '0' and shelve_state = '1'
and p.product_name like concat('%', #{param.productName}, '%')
and p.shelve_area = #{param.shelveArea}
order by p.create_time desc

select p.id, p.product_name, p.product_code, p.product_brief, p.product_text, p.product_pics, p.merchant_id, p.if_shipped, p.deliver, p.shelve_state, p.shelve_area, p.logistic_id, p.index_topped, p.brand_name, p.product_classify, p.product_skus, p.product_specs, p.labels, p.product_guarantees, pst.view_amount, pst.order_amount, cmi.charge_person_phone as customerServicePhone from cm_product p left join cm_product_statistics_trend pst on pst.product_id = p.id left join cm_merchant_info cmi on p.merchant_id = cmi.id where p.deleted = '0' and p.shelve_state = '1' and p.id = #{id}

select id, product_name, product_pics from cm_product where id in
#{id}

select p.id, p.product_name, p.product_pics, p.merchant_id, pst.view_amount, pst.order_amount from cm_product p left join cm_product_statistics_trend pst on pst.product_id = p.id where deleted = '0' and shelve_state = '1' order by pst.view_amount desc, p.create_time desc limit 10
